author: CP9M
content: Completed: DNS failure capture via onErrorOccurred. Added onErrorOccurred listener to dns-instrument.ts filtering for NS_ERROR_UNKNOWN_HOST, new 'error' column in all schema files (SQLite, Parquet, TypeScript), test_values.py updated, new test_dns_failure_captured test using example.invalid. All 3 DNS tests and 10 storage tests pass. Pre-commit clean.
